description: Multi-turn context-aware routing regression guard. Reproduces the keyword-less-follow-up misroute fixed by context-enriched, domain-coherent routing (docs/ROUTING-CONTEXT-FIX.md). Drive as ONE conversation (LibreChat/BFF sends the growing window each turn); the gateway routes on the recent-user-turn window, derives the domain from a broad semantic pass + margin gate, then re-scopes. Principal rm_jane covers REL-00042 (Whitman) and REL-00099 (Calderon); Okafor is NOT in the book. No domain literal is embedded in the gateway — expected_domain is asserted from the winning agent manifest's own domain field.

turns.user: Give me a summary of the Whitman Family Office holdings
turns.note: Baseline in-coverage wealth query — must keep working.
Out-of-coverage: routes to wealth (has domain vocabulary), coverage CHECK denies. Clean deny, NOT misrouted to insurance.

turns.user: can you then summarize for Calderon Trust (REL-00099)?
turns.note: THE fix. Keyword-less follow-up; bare-message routing scored insurance.claim_status @0.312 and pruned wealth → wrong deny. Context-enriched routing now routes to wealth; Calderon is in the book → succeeds.
Terse, no actionable ask → classifier says CLARIFY → routed on the bare message (no context carry) → margin-abstain → clean clarification, not the noise loop.
Bare name → CLARIFY intent, routed on bare message, top score in noise band → deterministic clarification. Must NOT inherit a confident domain from history and answer.
